zh.lifeSummary: George Lanphere於1631年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏。他於1669年與Jane Hulet在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1731年10月7日在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利享年100歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: George Lanphere于1631年出生在英国英格兰波克夏。他于1669年与Jane Hulet在美国罗德岛州華盛頓維斯特利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1731年10月7日在美国罗德岛州華盛頓維斯特利享年100岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lanphere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Lanfear  .

variants.name: Lanfear
meanings: Welsh and English: habitational name from any of the many places in Wales called Llanfair ‘church of Saint Mary’, from Welsh llan ‘church’ + Mair ‘Mary’, for example Llanfair Caereinion (Montgomeryshire). Compare Lamphear , Lamphere , Lamphier , Lanfair , Lanphear , Lanpher , Lanphere , and Lanphier .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: George Lanphere was born in 1631, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Jane Hulet in 1669, in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 7 October 1731, in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States, at the age of 100.

ja.Bershire, England: イギリスイギリスバークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: George Lanphereは1631年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアで生まれた。1669年にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーでJane Huletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1731年10月7日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーで100歳で死去した。

ko.Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 킨그스 웨스털리
ko.lifeSummary: George Lanphere(은)는 1631년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 태어났다. 그는 1669년 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리에서 Jane Hulet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1731년 10월 7일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: George Lanphere родился в 1631 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Hulet в 1669 г. в местности вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 7 октября 1731 г. в местности вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 100 лет.
